embed.title: Whitelist Review Process
embed.description: Complete the form in this ticket and keep your answers accurate. Staff will use that information for the whitelist decision.

fields.name: What Happens Next
fields.value: Finish the form, wait for staff review, and respond in this ticket if staff ask follow-up questions.

fields.name: Be Accurate
fields.value: Only submit information you are prepared to stand behind during review.

embed.title: Application Expectations
embed.description: A clean ticket flow helps staff work faster and gives you a better chance of a smooth review.

fields.name: Do Not Bump Repeatedly
fields.value: Repeated bumps slow staff down and do not move your application ahead in the queue.

fields.name: Read The Rules
fields.value: Make sure you understand the server rules and whitelist requirements before asking for a decision.

fields.name: Need To Update Something?
fields.value: Reply in this ticket with the new information so staff can review the latest version.
